title: Surface Map
description:
Per-stack mapping from the four canonical surfaces (plus optional extension
surfaces) to file-path globs within a repository that uses this stack.
Consumed by validators to implement the "surface ↔ file pattern drift" rule
(rule 3.2 of `docs/automation-contract-algorithm.md`): given a git diff,
derive the set of affected surfaces and compare to the Change Manifest's
`surfaces_touched`.

Canonical surfaces are defined in `docs/surfaces.md`. Extension surfaces
(asset, experience, performance-budget, data-quality, compliance,
hardware-interface, real-world, model, uncontrollable-external) follow
the same structure but are stack-specific.

One file may belong to multiple surfaces; overlap is informational, not
a drift error.

stack.description:
Stack identifier matching the bridge filename stem (e.g. "flutter",
"android-kotlin", "android-compose", "ktor", "unity").

bridge_doc.description: Relative path to the stack bridge document.

stack_extensions.description:
Optional extension surfaces per `docs/surfaces.md`. Keys are surface
names in snake_case with `_surface` suffix; values follow the same
shape as canonical surfaces.

items.description:
git pathspec / fnmatch glob relative to repo root. Must be
machine-consumable — no prose, no parenthetical remarks.

notes.description:
Human-facing rationale, boundary conditions, known overlaps with
other surfaces. Never consumed by the validator.
